case_title: CLIVE WILKINSON ARCHITECTS VS. KEVIN O'CONNOR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CLIVE WILKINSON ARCHITECTS AS TO DEFENDANT O'CONNOR, KEVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$179.00); STAMPED: (FILE BY FAX)CA RULE 2.303 SERVED JUN-22-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT O'CONNOR, KEVIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-28-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 8/29/22. CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO KEVIN O'CONNOR- ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2022 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER TO DEC-14-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CLIVE WILKINSON ARCHITECTS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEVIN O'CONNOR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ORALLY DECLARATION TO UPDATE ADDRESS TO "1839 18TH AVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94122", UPDATED BY COURTROOM CLERK. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-09-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-16-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT O'CONNOR, KEVIN
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE BY DEFENDANT **GRANTED**

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE KEVIN O'CONNOR BY DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANACES
